What entities does SHAPE.RELIEF link to and why?

**SHAPE.RELIEF · Relief**

**Relationships (3):**
  SHAPE.RELIEF —[DERIVES]→ FAMILY.F01 (Resonance) — Relief is the moment resonance locks — the tension between two coupled oscillators collapses as they find shared frequency.
  SHAPE.RELIEF —[EMERGES_AS]→ FAMILY.F04 (Life) — In living systems, relief marks the end of a grief or pain cycle — the void geometry has been measured and a new attractor has formed.
  SHAPE.RELIEF —[ALIGNS_WITH]→ PRINCIPLE.P01 (Symmetry) — Symmetry is restored at the moment of relief — the broken symmetry of tension resolves back toward the ground state.
